core_arc: Rain, snow, or sunshine changes the day's plans and leads to unexpected fun.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.WEATHER_TYPE: Type of weather — rain, snow, wind, sunshine
personalisation_slots.NEW_ACTIVITY: What they end up doing instead

scenes.outline: [NAME] woke up and looked outside. [NAME] wanted to [ORIGINAL_PLAN] today.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking out the window in the morning, hopeful expression.

scenes.outline: But then the [WEATHER_TYPE] came! 'Oh no,' said [NAME]. 'Now we cannot [ORIGINAL_PLAN].'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking at the [WEATHER_TYPE] through the window, disappointed.

scenes.outline: [FRIEND] came over. 'The [WEATHER_TYPE] has ruined our plans!' said [NAME]. [FRIEND] thought for a moment.
'I have an idea!' said [FRIEND]. 'We can [NEW_ACTIVITY] instead!' [NAME] smiled.
scenes.illustration_brief: [FRIEND] having an idea, [NAME] looking interested and hopeful.

scenes.outline: So they did [NEW_ACTIVITY]. It was actually really fun! [NAME] and [FRIEND] laughed.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] engaged in [NEW_ACTIVITY], having fun despite the weather.

scenes.outline: The [WEATHER_TYPE] was not so bad after all. In fact, it made things special.
'This is even better than our original plan!' said [NAME]. [FRIEND] agreed.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] looking happy, perhaps hugging or high-fiving.

scenes.outline: That night, [NAME] thought about the day. Sometimes the best days are the ones you don't plan.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] in bed, smiling, thinking about the fun day.

comprehension_questions.inference: How did [NAME] feel when they couldn't do the original plan?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What might [NAME] do next time there is unexpected weather?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: r, a, i, n. Copy the word: rain.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: weather, changed, fun. Write about your favourite weather.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about a time plans changed. How can you make the best of changes?

space.NEW_ACTIVITY: make a model solar system inside

unicorns.NEW_ACTIVITY: have a magical indoor tea party

baking.NEW_ACTIVITY: bake cakes with what was at home

art.NEW_ACTIVITY: paint the rain on the window
